_comment: Template for creating a per-user GoAlert escalation policy via GraphQL API. Replace all {placeholder} values at runtime.
query: mutation CreateEscalationPolicy($input: CreateEscalationPolicyInput!) { createEscalationPolicy(input: $input) { id name } }

input.name: doingok-policy-{userId}
input.description: Wellness alert escalation for DoingOK user {userId}

steps._comment: One entry per trusted contact, in priority_order
